_comment: Removed from the FWSS source in v1.3.0 (pricing is now per-dataset, captured at create-time). Retained here so Ponder still subscribes to it - needed (a) to keep indexing mainnet v1.2.1 emissions until that network upgrades, and (b) to backfill historical pre-v1.3.0 PricingUpdated rows on any reindex-from-genesis (Ponder skips events not in the ABI). Only safe to remove once no indexed deployment will ever need its pre-v1.3.0 history reconstructed.
name: PricingUpdated
